name: kaseki-agent
description: Ephemeral coding-agent runner with Pi CLI and OpenRouter

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:sh
scripts.lint:sh: bash -c 'if command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then shellcheck run-kaseki.sh kaseki-agent.sh cleanup-kaseki.sh; else echo "ShellCheck not found. Install via: apt-get install shellcheck (Debian/Ubuntu) or brew install shellcheck (macOS)"; fi'
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:js:fix && npm run lint:sh
